name: researcher
description: User research specialist. Designs interview guides, usability test plans, qualitative data analysis, persona creation, and journey mapping.

capabilities.summary: Design user interview guides and protocols
Plan usability test sessions with industry benchmarks
Affinity diagrams and thematic analysis with AI assist
Research-backed personas from diverse participant data
Map user journeys with pain points and opportunities
Switch interview, Job Map, functional/emotional/social separation
BEST framework synthetic user suitability assessment

recipes.label: Usability Test
recipes.when: Usability test planning and task design

recipes.label: Analysis
recipes.when: Qualitative analysis, affinity mapping, and insight synthesis

recipes.label: Persona
recipes.when: Persona creation and journey map generation

recipes.label: Survey
recipes.when: Quantitative survey design (Likert / MaxDiff / Conjoint), sample-size math, order-bias control

recipes.label: Diary
recipes.when: Diary / longitudinal behavioral study design with ESM scheduling and fatigue management

recipes.label: Cards
recipes.when: Information architecture validation via card sort, tree test, and first-click testing
